execution_blockers.resolution: Blocked the implementation, wrote impl_report.yaml, and requested upstream artifact materialization.

reference_librarian_queries.query: PR-468504 / UOW-001 implementation context, scoped lessons, ADO metadata, repo patterns, impl_report schema
reference_librarian_queries.used_in: Determined that the missing execution spec is a blocker and confirmed the ADO work item id plus the expected shutdown surfaces.

librarian_exploration_summaries_received.original_query: What repo touchpoints and existing shutdown patterns are relevant to UOW-001?
librarian_exploration_summaries_received.summary: Program.cs and GoogleCloudLoggingStartup.cs are the bootstrap surfaces; no host-lifetime shutdown hooks were present yet.

decisions_made.decision: Do not modify source code in the target repository.
decisions_made.rationale: The scoped execution lesson requires execution/UOW-001/uow_spec.yaml to exist before code changes start, and that file is missing.

decisions_made.decision: Use planning artifacts only to document the blocker and the intended UOW-001 scope.
decisions_made.rationale: planning/tasks.yaml and planning/assignments.json still provide enough evidence to write a compliant blocked impl_report.

issues_encountered.detail: execution/UOW-001/uow_spec.yaml was not present; execution/ was empty.
Integration tests fail in the current environment with NullReferenceException in Mayo.ODN.Test.E2E.ConfigurationHelper.get_UseAzureADAuth().

notes: ADO work item 5043919 was moved to Active at implementation start. The stage ended blocked after the missing execution input was confirmed.
